title: Linear Algebra
description: This course covers the fundamentals of linear algebra with applications to computer science and data science. Topics include systems of linear equations, matrix algebra, determinants, vector spaces, linear transformations, eigenvalues and eigenvectors, orthogonality, and least squares. The course emphasizes both computational techniques and theoretical understanding. Applications to computer graphics, machine learning, data compression, and network analysis are highlighted throughout. Linear algebra is essential for students pursuing machine learning (CS305), deep learning (CS322), computer graphics (CS312), and related areas. Prerequisite: MATH120 for foundational mathematical maturity.
topics: Systems of linear equations and Gaussian elimination
outcomes: Solve systems of linear equations using matrix methods
Perform matrix operations and compute determinants
Understand and apply vector space concepts
Apply orthogonality concepts to least squares problems
Connect linear algebra to applications in CS and data science
